rationale: Frontmatter description front-loads the task ('Retrieve and filter messages from channels with advanced querying capabilities'), 0 interleaved snippets, consistent use of AmityMessage/LiveCollection/subChannelId, and present in llms.txt — missing only API-named headings for the score-5 threshold.
suggestions: Add API-named headings ('## MessageRepository.getMessages()', '## Query by Tags', '## Filter by Message Type') to support canonical anchor linking.
The filtering variant sections ('Filter by Tags', 'Filter by Type') could each carry a brief one-line API signature in the heading description.
